data.title: WesternU College of Graduate Nursing ranked among U.S. News & World Report's Best Nursing Schools
data.description: In Pomona, California, on April 7, 2026, the College of Graduate Nursing (CGN) at Western University of Health Sciences has been recognized as one of the top nursing schools for master's programs in the 2026 rankings by U.S. News & World Report. This announcement was made today, April 7, 2026. For more information, you can refer to the 2026 Best Nursing Schools list.

data.title: S&P Global Expands U.S. Employee Benefits By Matching Federal Government Contributions to Child Savings Accounts
data.description: Recently, S&P Global made public its decision to match the U.S. government's $1,000 contributions towards newly created Section 530A child savings accounts, also referred to as "Trump Accounts." This initiative will be extended to eligible children of employees born on January 1, 2025. The company will match the government's $1,000 contribution for these children. The announcement was made on April 7, 2026, by S&P Global, listed under NYSE as SPGI.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico Reports a Passenger Traffic Decrease in March 2026 of 8.9% Compared to 2025
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, on April 7, 2026, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) released early terminal passenger traffic data for March 2026, in contrast to March 2025.

data.title: DFC Funding Positions PELA to Deliver Critical Antimony Supply to U.S. and Allied Markets
data.description: An agreement has been reached between Pela Global Limited (PELA), an Australian company specializing in critical and precious metals, and the U.S. International Development Finance Corporation (DFC). PELA has secured up to US$5 million in Project Development funding through this deal.
